Late Slam Calculator

Upload your orders file → map columns → fetch Google Sheet forecast → get per-30-min slot Forecast vs Actual vs Lateslam table per store.

ℹ️ Required columns: picklist_created_time  ·  pl_create_to_stage  ·  promise_utr  ·  units_picked  ·  delivery_station_code (store)
Lateslam rule: pl_create_to_stage > promise_utr → LATESLAM ✅
Report Date
Store Filter

Upload Orders File

CSV or Excel · must have Promise Time & Pick List Created Time columns

.XLSX.XLS.CSV

Slot Time *

Actual Secs *
pl_create_to_stage

promise_utr

units_picked
Store ID
delivery_station_code
ℹ️ Lateslam = pl_create_to_stage > promise_utr (seconds comparison)

🔬

Late Slam Deep Dive

Upload Late Slam file + Outbound Pick file → trace every order from creation to staging

📋
File 1 — Late Slam Data
picklist_created_time, assignment, staging, pl_create_to_stage, promise_utr
🚀
File 2 — Outbound Pick Data
Timestamp, LocationId, ASIN, User (picker), ReferenceIdValue (order_id)
⏰ Hourly Breakdown — FC vs Actual vs Late Slam
Hour Time Window FC Orders Actual Orders Late Slams LS Rate FC Var % Units Picked Pickers Needed Avg Delay (s) Top Zone
📈 Hourly Trend — Orders vs Late Slams
🚨 Late Slam Orders — Full Timeline
Order ID Store Picker Units UPO Bucket Drop Time Assign Time Assign→1st Pick Pick Duration Pack/Stage Assign→Stage (s)PL→Stage (s)Delay (s) Delay Bucket Zone(s) Slow Picks

Location ID Maker

Enter full location IDs like P-1-A116F182 — auto-splits into label sections, assigns color by bay letter, generates scannable QR. A4 · 24 labels/page.

ℹ️ Auto-split: P-1-A116F182 → Left: P-1-A / 116 · Center: F182 ↑ · Color: Red (F=Red)

Deep Dive — Weekly Trend & RCA Quality
NEW
Compare VOC week-over-week per store, see which areas improved vs which got impacted, and surface tickets where the RCA reply doesn't match the customer's complaint.
⚠ Example of an unsatisfied RCA: Customer comment says "vegetables were moldy" but the RCA reply is just "vendor to check" — the reply deflects the issue instead of fixing it. We auto-highlight these so you can re-open them.
Top VOC Products (15 Products = 21% of Total VOC)
Product Total VOC Contrib % Primary Issue Type
